source_ref.compose_env_source: existing external 211 runtime env file supplied through compose --env-file; values were not copied or printed
source_ref.deployment_note: runtime-only image rebased from the previous healthy image because dependencies did not change; compose used --no-build with the reviewed image tag. Container labels still record the old external env-file path, so this evidence must not be used as G0 source-authority closure.

review_notes: This entry is a reviewed summary of the 6088d5d 211 aggregate verifier output, not a raw runtime dump.
The API and worker containers reported image ai-platform:6088d5d-alert-trace-acceptance with matching source revision, runtime subject, and OCI revision labels before the smoke was recorded.
The compose config label pointed to the repo-local deploy composition, but the compose environment-file label still recorded the old external env-file path; secret values were not printed or copied.

The reviewed summary omits credentials, connection strings, object locators, workspace filesystem paths, executor-only internals, run identifiers, file identifiers, artifact identifiers, storage locators, real user identifiers, and personal workstation paths.

The smoke confirms the context snapshot public projection reports summary_source=chat_stream and safe input_keys including attachments and message for a file-backed run without leaking raw material IDs or forbidden projection terms.

This evidence supports the Foundation Alpha POC runtime loop for 6088d5d only. It does not close production concurrency, Docker sandbox hardening, ordinary-user multi-agent, department rollout, packaged frontend image release acceptance, signed Skill package/SBOM, or G0 source-authority parity while labels still record the old external env-file layout.
open_followups: #21 recorded multi-tenant capacity/load evidence remains required before raising production concurrency defaults.
G7 Docker sandbox hardening and Docker-capable sandbox smoke remain blocked.
G8 ordinary-user multi-agent exposure remains feature-flagged/internal only.
Packaged frontend image smoke/release acceptance remains separate from this thin-shell POC smoke.
Signed package or SBOM review evidence for Skill release remains open.
Repo-local deploy environment layout must be reconciled before G0 source-authority closure.
